name: kaicalls
description: Official KaiCalls plugin for AI phone agents, outbound calls, call review, and KaiCalls MCP access.

interface.shortDescription: Give your AI agent a phone with KaiCalls.
interface.longDescription: Use KaiCalls to connect AI agents to phone calls: list agents, review recent calls, read transcripts, and start approved outbound calls through the hosted KaiCalls MCP connector or public REST API.
defaultPrompt: Call this lead with my KaiCalls agent.
